Interface ISelectionSet2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that manage a set of selected table rows or features.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("098AF83F-8390-11D4-9FD1-00C04F6BDF0C")]
public interface ISelectionSet2 : ISelectionSet
